What foundations do we need before investing our hard-earned money?
Should we worry about inflation or deflation?
What kind of assets do US households own?
How do asset safety, duration, and volatility affect interest rates?
What's the best investment one can make?
This presentation will answer all of the above questions.
You can download the presentation slides from [here](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.files.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F06%2Fhow-to-think-about-investing.pdf&sr=1&signature=88e6f384a870174e258fd7cc53b98015&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z).
You can download the spreadsheet used in the presentation from [here](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.files.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F06%2Fhow-to-think-about-investing.xlsx&sr=1&signature=3a1b22c2d5ab9893629f2f8e2c7f3518&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z).
You can watch the part 1 and part 2 of Finance and Investing series from [here](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F06%2F02%2Fteaching-my-son-finance-and-investing-part-1-joys-of-compounding%2F&sr=1&signature=fe477fa388b4a4e18c611fdd043619e2&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z) and [here](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fjanav.wordpress.com%2F2021%2F06%2F06%2Fteaching-my-son-finance-and-investing-part-2-whats-getting-in-your-way%2F&sr=1&signature=fe159ba77dc613e9afbd37fbcd2a65b5&user=8c75b1c84af96d984bdb9fbc54a41aa1&_&_z=z).
